name: memhub
description: MemHub plugins for Claude Code — auto-capture coding sessions into team memory.

plugins.name: memhub
plugins.description: Auto-capture Claude Code sessions into MemHub team memory at session end.

plugins.name: fleet
plugins.description: Live awareness across parallel Claude Code agents in git worktrees of the same repo — a shared board file plus hooks keep every agent informed of what its siblings are working on.
